subject: Re: Code Review - PR #3498
content:
Hi Quinn,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Data Science team and they're
looking into the Search Index issue. Current status:

- Root cause: corrupted cache entries
- Impact: ~123 users affected in APAC
- ETA for fix: 15:30 CET today
- Severity: P1

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Olivia is the point person if
you need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Clear browser cache.

Regards,
Leo
--
Leo Clark
Data Scientist | Lexcorp
+1-923-751-5389
